message:
chore(deps): bump tempfile 3.14.0 → 3.27.0

Patch-floor bump of the tempfile dev-dep in fp-conformance and
fp-frankentui. Cargo.lock already at 3.27.0 transitively.

The 3.14 → 3.27 series is additive (new `env::override_temp`,
`Builder::disable_cleanup`, env var support); callers using
`tempfile::TempDir::new()`, `Builder::new().prefix().tempdir()`,
and `NamedTempFile::new()` are fully compatible.

Verification:
- `rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets` → OK
- `rch exec -- cargo test -p fp-conformance --lib` → 334 passed,
  18 failed (baseline pre-existing failures unchanged).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
